caveats: Fixed 200 m half-width is intentionally generous for Grand Canyon/Lees Ferry review and does not represent channel width.
Lines use preview stationing normals and inherit the direction, CRS, and river-mile caveats of the mainstem stationing candidate.
No imagery, DEM, hydrology, release-band, NPS/GCMRC, or oarsman validation has accepted these seed lines yet.
promotion_gates: Compare each seed line against NAIP water edge, 3DEP terrain relief, visible banks, and release-dependent wet-bank/sandbar exposure before deriving bank polygons.
Confirm canyon working CRS and river-mile stationing before using these offsets for solver or Unreal geometry.
Clip, move, delete, or add cross sections in the editor based on oarsman-reviewed lines, eddies, sandbars, side channels, camps/access sensitivity, and rapid-scale features.
Do not infer wetted width, bank truth, or hazard geometry from these fixed-width seed lines alone.
